summary: A clip combining two news sources. One segment from WYFF, shown in a Carl Higbie Frontline frame, displays footage of a man in an orange jail uniform seated, with the lower-third ILLEGAL DRIVES DRUNK, HITS & KILLS TWO BOYS ON SIDEWALK. A Newsmax segment shows a man with a beard in a dark suit speaking to camera in front of a Homeland Security backdrop and a DHS seal, labeled SEC. MARKWAYNE MULLIN, SECRETARY OF HOMELAND SECURITY.

script.scene: Footage of a man in an orange jail uniform; lower-third reads ILLEGAL DRIVES DRUNK, HITS & KILLS TWO BOYS ON SIDEWALK.
A man in a dark suit speaks to camera in front of a Homeland Security backdrop, labeled SEC. MARKWAYNE MULLIN, SECRETARY OF HOMELAND SECURITY.
The interview continues with the same lower-third.

notable_text: ILLEGAL DRIVES DRUNK, HITS & KILLS TWO BOYS ON SIDEWALK; SEC. MARKWAYNE MULLIN; SECRETARY OF HOMELAND SECURITY; NEWSMAX
